description: Toy mood module used for the public showcase.

anchors: During the difficult period, was your sleep noticeably worse?

followups.duration_weeks: Roughly how many weeks did that last?
followups.frequency: Was it happening most days or only sometimes?
followups.impairment_domains: What part of daily life did it affect most?

anchors: Did activities that were usually enjoyable start feeling flat or effortful?

followups.duration_weeks: How long did that change stay noticeable?
followups.frequency: Did it show up most days?
followups.impairment_domains: Did it affect work, social life, or something else?
